chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P. No.D-767 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 19.11.2025 Rao Faisal Ali, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Shanker Meghwar, Advocate for respondent No.7. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh along-with Abdul Wahab, Additional Director Local Government on behalf of Secretary Local Government. == Through this petition, the petitioner seeks following relief:- “a. Direct the Respondents No. 1, 3 & 7 to regularize/permanent the petitioner in BPS-05 as PESH IMAM of Muhammadi Mosque Town Committee Nangarparkar. b. Direct the Respondent No: 5 to issue the remaining salary of petitioner since June-2021 to disposal of petition. c. Direct the Respondent No: 1, 3 & 7 to include/calculate the last 3 years of Petitioner in service as a BPS-05 Pesh Imam of Muhammadi Mosque Town Committee Nagarparkar. d. Any other relief which this Honorable court deem fit may kindly be awarded to the Petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner was appointed as Pesh Imam in the year 2016 and since then he has been continuously performing his duties but he has been deprived of his salaries without any adverse orders having been passed by the competent authority. Today learned Assistant AG submits that in compliance of the previous orders, they have brought a cheque for twelve months salary. Learned counsel for the petitioner satisfied with such statement and submitted that meanwhile the issue of regularization of the petitioner needs to be decided by the Secretary Local Government within two months.

Today learned Assistant AG submits that in compliance of the previous orders, they have brought a cheque for twelve months salary. Learned counsel for the petitioner satisfied with such statement and submitted that meanwhile the issue of regularization of the petitioner needs to be decided by the Secretary Local Government within two months. Order accordingly. Officer present undertakes that the remaining salaries will be disbursed to the petitioner in the installments. Without touching the merits of the case, petition stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
